Pokemon Changes  
Sprites 3x’d from [https://msikma.github.io/pokesprite/overview/dex-gen8.html](https://msikma.github.io/pokesprite/overview/dex-gen8.html)

### **Key**

If a Pokemon is unlisted, it means they have no changes made to them.  
\+ means the move is totally new to the level up set.  
\- means the move has replaced the move usually learned at that level.  
\= means it's not a new move, but the level has been shifted.

![][image1]

### **Grookey**

Ability Two: Grassy Surge
